name: Rouille- Red Pepper Mayonnaise
recipeIngredient: 1 small slice of white bread (crust removed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the red bell pepper under the broiler (grill) until the skin turns black.
2. Remove from heat and place in a plastic bag for 5 minutes, or until the pepper is soft.
3. When cool, peel the pepper and discard the skin and seeds.
4. Mash to a fine paste.
5. Soak the bread in clam juice with saffron and cayenne until saturated.
6. Add the mashed garlic to the bread.
7. Combine the mustard with the egg yolks and mix well.
8. Gradually add the yolks to the bread, mixing 1 tablespoon of olive oil at a time until an emulsion is formed.
9. Combine the olive oil and peanut oil.
10. Slowly incorporate all the oil into the emulsion, whisking constantly.
11. Ensure the emulsion remains homogeneous before adding more oil.
12. Add lemon juice, salt, pepper, parsley, and tomato paste.
13. Season with cayenne pepper as needed.
14. Makes about 2 1/2 cups (2 fl oz/625 ml).
